summary: The SYNTAX score has been shown to correlate only with long-term adverse events rather than short-term in-hospital outcomes. It lacks sufficient statistical significance or clinical relevance when predicting early post-PCI results such as mortality or major complications in STEMI patients.

It lacks sufficient statistical significance or clinical relevance when predicting early post-PCI results such as mortality or major complications in STEMI patients.. Answer choice: B
